name: expo
label: Expo (React Native)
description: Head-start package for Expo / React Native apps. iOS-focused v1: ships a simulator-based Maestro acceptance slice (/uat → maestro-runner) with the Expo-iOS launch knowledge it depends on (xcodebuild fallback, Metro port guard, persisted-session auth), then learns each project's conventions on top. Android capabilities join this same domain later.
